notes: v0.12.6 — top bar rebuilt as the Command Deck layout (3 modules joined inside one magenta-bordered frame: Identity Pod | Stats Center | Currency Module, with vertical cyan separators that fade at the ends). Bar height 88 → 100 so stacked currencies fit. Windows only.
